announcedTimeline: Multiple announced deployments shifted or cancelled
publicStatus: NRC design certification achieved; commercial project execution remains mixed
keyDependency: Customer commitment, project economics, EPC execution
diligenceRelevance: Useful precedent that regulatory progress does not eliminate commercial cancellation risk.

publicStatus: Public demonstration activity and fuel-cycle dependencies
diligenceRelevance: Highlights fuel-cycle dependencies for advanced reactor timelines.

announcedTimeline: Test reactor path before commercial scale
publicStatus: Public licensing precedent for a test reactor path
diligenceRelevance: Relevant NRC precedent, but not direct proof of commercial campus deliverability.

announcedTimeline: Commercial deployment target varies by project
keyDependency: Fuel fabrication, customer offtake, licensing and project execution
diligenceRelevance: Comparable for customer-backed advanced reactor deployment claims.

announcedTimeline: Commercial timelines subject to licensing and fuel supply
keyDependency: Licensing maturity, fuel supply, customer deployment sites
diligenceRelevance: Comparable for public-market advanced reactor claims and fuel-cycle scrutiny.

keyDependency: Qualification, licensing, capacity ramp, customer demand
diligenceRelevance: Useful for assessing whether reactor demand has matched fuel-cycle readiness.

announcedTimeline: Restart target subject to NRC and financing milestones
publicStatus: Public restart effort and government support
keyDependency: Regulatory approval, refurbishment execution, power offtake
diligenceRelevance: Restart precedent, but different risk profile from new-build SMRs.

announcedTimeline: Completed after major delays and cost growth
diligenceRelevance: Critical precedent for EPC and construction risk in nuclear underwriting.

announcedTimeline: Capacity ramp dependent on funding and contracts
keyDependency: Commercial scale-up, government support, customer commitments
diligenceRelevance: Core comparable for HALEU availability assumptions.

announcedTimeline: Programmatic availability tied to awards and supply chain ramp
keyDependency: Procurement, contracts, enrichment and deconversion capacity
diligenceRelevance: Important public signal but not proof of project-specific fuel availability.
